description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a matrix job strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, pypy-3.7), excluding certain combinations. Check out the repository code, run base setup actions, install dependencies, list installed packages, and run tests with coverage using pytest and codecov.
